common.dropFiles: Drop files here or click to browse
common.maxFilesInfo: Up to {count} files — images, videos, PDFs

toast.actionFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.

createSubsection.descriptionSingular: Add a {entity} profile to your Equus account.

home.welcomeSubtitle: Your dashboard for horses, stables, and professional profiles.
home.guestDescription: The platform for equine professionals, stable teams, and horse owners.
home.addHorseDescription: Add a horse to your account and start managing records, care, and visibility.
home.profilesDescription: Jump straight into the areas you already manage on Equus.
home.getStartedDescription: Sign in or create a free account to add horses and build your Equus presence.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.description: Use your email and password or continue with Google.
signIn.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email before signing in.

signUp.title: Create an account
signUp.description: Register with email and password or continue with Google.

confirmEmail.title: Confirm your email
confirmEmail.success: Your email has been verified. You can now sign in.
confirmEmail.missingToken: This confirmation link is missing a token.
confirmEmail.error: This link is invalid or has expired.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.description: Enter a new password for your account.
resetPassword.success: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in.
resetPassword.missingToken: This reset link is missing a token.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we will send reset instructions if an account exists.
forgotPassword.success: If an account exists for this email, you will receive instructions shortly.

resendConfirmation.title: Resend confirmation
resendConfirmation.description: Enter your email to receive a new confirmation link.
resendConfirmation.success: If an account exists for this email, you will receive instructions shortly.
resendConfirmation.alreadyVerified: This email is already verified. You can sign in.

auth.passwordPolicy: Password must be at least 8 characters and include a lowercase letter, an uppercase letter, a number, and a symbol.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

notAllowed.title: Access not allowed
notAllowed.description: You do not have permission to view this page or perform this action.
notAllowed.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
notAllowed.wrongAccount: This invitation is for a different account. Sign in with the invited email address.
notAllowed.emailUnverified: Please verify your email before signing in.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: This page could not be loaded. You can try again or return home.

workplaces.title: Your workplaces
workplaces.description: Business profiles you own or staff memberships, including pending invitations.

relationships.title: Relationship invitations
relationships.description: Pending horse relationship requests waiting for your response.
relationships.empty: You have no pending relationship invitations.

ownershipTransfers.title: Ownership transfer requests
ownershipTransfers.description: Pending ownership changes waiting for your response.
ownershipTransfers.empty: You have no pending ownership transfer requests.

signup.staffBanner: You were invited to join a workplace on Equus. Sign up with the invited email address.
signup.relationshipBanner: You were invited to a horse relationship on Equus. Sign up with the invited email address.

horseProviders.emailFallbackToggle: Not on Equus? Invite by email
horseProviders.entityOwnedHint: This provider must have a listing on Equus before you can invite them.

hosting.title: Hosting & logistics
hosting.description: Stables, transport, riding clubs, and breeders linked to this horse.

care.title: Health & care
care.description: Veterinary, grooming, and farrier services for this horse.

training.title: Training & riding
training.description: Trainers, coaches, and riders connected to this horse.

types.stableHint: Invite a stable to host or care for this horse.
types.transportHint: Invite a transport company for this horse.
types.ridingClubHint: Invite a riding club linked to this horse.
types.breederHint: Invite a breeder operation for this horse.
types.veterinaryHint: Invite a vet practice for this horse.
types.groomHint: Invite a groom for direct care at home (not barn staff).
types.farrierHint: Invite a farrier for this horse.
types.trainerHint: Invite a trainer for this horse.
types.coachHint: Invite a coach for this horse.
types.riderHint: Invite a rider profile linked to this horse.

validation.emailInvalid: Please provide a valid email address
validation.passwordPolicy: Password must be at least 8 characters and include a lowercase letter, an uppercase letter, a number, and a symbol.
validation.fieldRequired: This field cannot be empty when provided
validation.invalidCoordinates: Please enter valid longitude and latitude
validation.addressFieldRequired: This address field is required when address is provided

profile.title: Your profile
profile.description: Update your personal details and preferences.
profile.incompleteBanner: Your profile is incomplete. You can save changes at any time and finish the rest later.

addressMap.title: Location preview
addressMap.hintShortQuery: Enter more of your address to locate it on the map.
addressMap.geoNotFound: We could not find this address on the map. Check the fields and try again.
addressMap.geoFailed: Geocoding failed. Try again in a moment.
addressMap.footerNotice: Map data © OpenStreetMap contributors. Geocoding uses the public Nominatim service—use sparingly in production or host your own instance.

profile.photoTooLarge: Image must be 5 MB or smaller.
profile.passwordSetDescription: We will email you a link to set a password for this account.
profile.passwordChangeDescription: We will email you a link to reset your password.
profile.passwordEmailFailed: Could not send password email. Please try again.
profile.deactivateDescription: Deactivate your Equus login. Your data is retained for horses, relationships, and records you participated in.
profile.deactivateDialogDescription: You will be signed out and will not be able to sign in again with this account. This does not delete horses or business records linked to you.
profile.deactivateFailed: Could not deactivate account. Please try again.

createHorse.title: Add a horse
createHorse.description: Add a horse to your account and start managing records, care, and visibility.
createHorse.contactNameRequired: Contact name is required when not using owner contact
createHorse.contactPhoneRequired: Contact phone is required when not using owner contact
createHorse.contactEmailRequired: Contact email is required when not using owner contact
createHorse.contactEmailInvalid: Please provide a valid email address
createHorse.name: Name

useOwnerContactOptions.false: Use a different contact for this horse

userProfile.title: User profile
userProfile.description: Equus member profile linked from horses and other listings. Users are not searchable.

horsesList.title: Horses
horsesList.description: Browse horses in the Equus network.

horseHub.subtitle: Manage this horse
horseHub.connectDescription: Invite stables, vets, trainers, and other providers. They accept or decline — providers never send requests to your horse.

ownership.title: Ownership
ownership.description: Transfer this horse or manage co-owners. Changes apply only after the other party accepts.
ownership.transferDescription: Send ownership to another person by email. They accept the request in their ownership inbox.
ownership.coOwnersDescription: Remove or promote co-owners. Each person must accept before the change applies.
ownership.coOwnersBlockTransfer: Remove all co-owners before you can transfer main ownership.

errors.EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Please verify your email before signing in.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to perform this action.

horseHistory.title: History
horseHistory.comingSoon: Horse history and timeline coming soon.

home.title: Equus — Horse & Equestrian Network
home.description: Connect with horse owners, stables, breeders, and equestrian professionals. Find horses, services, and build your equestrian network.
home.keywords: horses, equestrian, stables, breeders, horse network, equus

homeDashboard.title: Home | Equus
homeDashboard.description: Your Equus dashboard — manage horses, stables, and connections.
